DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR CONTINUED JURY TRIAL. ATNY VINCENT BEIRNE PRESENT FOR PLTF. ATNY CHARLES COLLINS PRESENT FOR DEFT. DEFT JOSEPH DONOVAN DOES NOT APPEAR BY 10AM. WHEN CONTACTED BY HIS ATTORNEY HE STATES THAT HE IS ILL. COURT AND COUNSEL RESUME SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. AT 3:08PM COURT IS CONVENED WITH COUNSEL. ALSO PRESENT IS SABINA FOO, AGENT FOR PLTF. COURT AFFIRMS THAT A WRITTEN STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HAS BEEN EXECUTED AND SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES. CASE DEEMED SETTLED. COURT SIGNS ORDER REFUNDING PER DIEM AND JURY FEES POSTED BY DEFENDANT.
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT DONOVAN, JOSEPH
